name: Mad Tracks
short_description: Mad Tracks is an action packed toy car games. Play mini games and race in everyday places. Have immediate fun – guaranteed!
detailed_description:
Remember these toy car games we used to play for ever? MAD TRACKS is a fun and frantic racing action game inspired by pull-back-and-go racers. You are in control of the speed and enjoyment that these cars all gave us when we were kids!

Quick Facts


  • 100% party games (fun & frustration free)
  • Pull back friction vehicles!
  • Acrobatic Tracks!
  • Easy handling
  • Rewarding gameplay
  • 45 crazy Challenges
  • 15 pick ups and power ups!
  • 24 Mini Games (Mini Golf, Darts, Bowling, Pool …) and 21 races

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil
